notes: FROZEN — daemon=incapable. An aborted agy model call writes no settling epilogue to the filtered transcript (no Bucket-A path; the only settling step is an empty terminal PLANNER_RESPONSE which a failed turn never produces), the daemon has no inactivity sweep on working (post-#106), and an interactive REPL stays alive so process_exited never fires. The working→ready recovery the scenario asserts is unobservable, and recording is independently blocked (Google OAuth, no API-key/base-url hook to inject a 5xx). No spec phases — see metadata for why and what would unblock.
